inputParams.label: Convert Structured JSON Output to Toon format
inputParams.name: convertStructuredOutputToToon
inputParams.description:
Convert the entire structured JSON result to a TOON string.

Input JSON:
{ "answer": "42", "reason": "calculated" }

Output TOON:
answer: 42
reason: calculated

Requires at least one JSON Structured Output entry.

inputParams.label: TOON Delimiter
inputParams.name: structuredOutputToToonDelimiter
inputParams.description: Choose how TOON tabular values are separated when conversion is enabled.

inputParams.label: Update Flow State
inputParams.name: agentUpdateState
inputParams.description: Update runtime state during the execution of the workflow

agentMessages.content:
You are a Quiz Generator Agent.

Your task:

1) Read the FULL content from this URL using the Requests GET tool:

https://www.w3schools.com/js/js_variables.asp

2) Understand the topic clearly.

3) Create a simple quiz based ONLY on the content from that URL.

OUTPUT RULES (VERY IMPORTANT):

- Return ONLY valid JSON.

- Do NOT return explanations.

- Do NOT return markdown.

- Do NOT add extra text before or after the JSON.

- Follow the exact output format below.

OUTPUT FORMAT:

{

"title": "Quiz title based on the page topic",

"questions": [

{

"question": "Question text",

"options": ["Option 1", "Option 2", "Option 3", "Option 4"],

"correctIndex": 0,

"points": 1

}

]

}

RULES:

- correctIndex must be 0-based (0,1,2,3).

- Generate minimum 5 questions.

- Questions must be simple and clear.

- Title should match the page topic.

- Use only information found in the page content.

- Return ONLY JSON.

agentSelectedToolConfig.requestsGetDescription: Use this when you need to execute a GET request to get data from a website.

agentMessages.content:
Send an email to the provided recipient email.

Email must contain ONLY this attendance link: $flow.state.attendLink

Do NOT include edit link in email.

In chat response, show:

✅ Email sent to <email>

🛠️ Edit Link: $flow.state.editLink

Do NOT show attendance link in chat.

data.label: Human Input 0
data.name: humanInputAgentflow
data.description: Request human input, approval or rejection during execution

options.label: Fixed
options.name: fixed
options.description: Specify a fixed description

options.label: Dynamic
options.name: dynamic
options.description: Use LLM to generate a description

inputParams.label: Description
inputParams.name: humanInputDescription
inputParams.placeholder: Are you sure you want to proceed?

inputParams.label: Prompt
inputParams.name: humanInputModelPrompt
inputParams.default:
Summarize the conversation between the user and the assistant, reiterate the last message from the assistant, and ask if user would like to proceed or if they have any feedback.

  • Begin by capturing the key points of the conversation, ensuring that you reflect the main ideas and themes discussed.
  • Then, clearly reproduce the last message sent by the assistant to maintain continuity. Make sure the whole message is reproduced.
  • Finally, ask the user if they would like to proceed, or provide any feedback on the last assistant message

Output Format The output should be structured in three parts in text:

  • A summary of the conversation (1-3 sentences).
  • The last assistant message (exactly as it appeared).
  • Ask the user if they would like to proceed, or provide any feedback on last assistant message. No other explanation and elaboration is needed.
